title: Full Stack AI Developer
description:
• Hands-on experience with LLM integration (GPT, Gemini) and
prompt engineering • Proficiency with LangGraph and
LangSmith for building AI workflows and agents • Experience
with agent builder platforms, multi-agent systems, and agent
orchestration • Familiarity with Model Context Protocol
(MCP), MCP Tools, and A2A communication • Knowledge of
vector databases (PostgreSQL/PGVector), embeddings, and
Drift • Experience with Snowflake SQL and its AI
capabilities (Cortex AI, Snowpark ML)
responsibilities: Integrate LLMs (GPT, Gemini) into applications and implement prompt engineering strategies
Build AI workflows and agents using LangGraph and LangSmith
Design and implement multi-agent systems with agent orchestration
Work with agent builder platforms and implement agent-to-agent communication
Implement Model Context Protocol (MCP) and MCP Tools for AI systems
Design and manage vector databases (PostgreSQL/PGVector) and embeddings
Leverage Snowflake AI capabilities including Cortex AI and Snowpark ML
Monitor and manage model drift in production systems
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on work building AI workflows,
agents, and multi-agent systems using LangGraph and
LangSmith. The developer will work directly with LLMs,
prompt engineering, and agent orchestration, which is core
AI/ML development work.
